summary: Iteration 96 - Comprehensive testing of report/preview features, back button navigation, button styling, and export endpoints. All features working correctly.

backend_api_tests.details: All 9 pytest tests passed: health check, PDF export (report + barrister), DOCX export (report + barrister), barrister view endpoint, report status, case reports listing, case data

report_view_data.details: Report view shows correct case-specific data: Defendant 'Joshua Scott Homann', Offence 'Homicide', Sentence '30 years' imprisonment with a non-parole period of 22 years and 6 months'. No stale data observed.

barrister_view_data.details: Barrister view shows correct data: 'BARRISTER BRIEF' badge, 'Built from all 3 completed reports', defendant 'Joshua Scott Homann', sentence '30 years' incarceration, with a stipulated non-parole period of 22 years and 6 months', offence 'the murder of his partner, Kirralee Paepaerei'

preview_back_button.details: Back button on document preview correctly returns to originating report page (not landing page). Tested for both Report View and Barrister View.

preview_footer_branding.details: Print preview shows: (1) 'Created and Designed by Deb King' branding at top, (2) Dynamic footer with appellant name + document name + date (e.g., 'Criminal Appeal Case Management - Full Detailed Legal Analysis on Joshua Scott Homann - 27/03/2026'), (3) Page numbering ('Page 1'), (4) Footer message 'Created and Designed by Deb King — Thank you for using the tool. Good luck with the appeal process.'

payment_modal_buttons.details: Cancel button has 'bg-blue-700 text-white' styling (bright blue with white text). Generate Report button has 'landing-cta-primary' class which applies 'background: #2563eb' (bright blue) and 'color: #ffffff' (white text). Buttons are properly spaced (8px gap).

export_buttons.details: Print, Export Word, and Export PDF buttons visible and functional on both Report View and Barrister View pages.

barrister_view_route.details: Barrister view route (/cases/case_76056187ad4f/reports/rpt_dcb21f0efc62/barrister) loads correctly with all export actions enabled.

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features verified working: stale data guards, preview back navigation, footer branding/message, button styling
PaymentModal.jsx buttons correctly use 'bg-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-600 text-white' styling
ReportsSection.jsx Generate Report dialog uses 'landing-cta-primary' class for bright blue buttons
DocumentPreviewPage.jsx correctly implements returnTo routing for back button navigation
Print preview footer includes dynamic content: appellant name, document name, date, page number, and branding message
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 verified all features from the test request: (1) Report/Barrister views show correct case-specific offence/sentence data without stale data issues, (2) Preview back button returns to originating report page correctly, (3) Print preview shows footer with branding, dynamic text (appellant name + document name + date), page numbering, and thank you message, (4) Payment modal buttons have bright blue (#2563eb/bg-blue-700) with white text styling, (5) Backend PDF/DOCX export endpoints return 200 for both report and barrister exports. All tests passed.
